<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊、抱歉，

原本打算一起去买
鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>。

鼓隆城販售的<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>，

<unk[3:0:263]>如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的話，

rows.USen:

The same is true for my boyfriend.<PageBreak>The two of us were going to Goron City to
buy their trendy <Color=red>fire-resistant clothes<Color=white>...

<unk[3:0:10]>But when we were about to arrive, we
got tangled up with some Gorons with
<Color=red>strange-looking rocks<Color=white>.
I got scared and came back on my own.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>If you're going to <Color=red>Goron City<Color=white>, then you
should be very careful.

如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的話，

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>ゴロン<Ruby={2:4}ぞく>族って <Ruby={4:8}おんこう>温厚で<Ruby={2:4}やさ>優しい<Ruby={4:6}ぶぞく>部族だって
<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ってたんだけどなぁ<unk[5:1]>
<Size=80><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]><Color=red><Ruby={2:4}へん>変な<Ruby={2:6}かたち>形の<Ruby={2:4}いわ>岩<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}も>持ってたけど

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:18 87 97 107 101 117 112 95 48 49]>…エナシマ<Ruby={2:4}くん>君？ <Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰ってきたの？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}ま>待ちくたびれて ちょっと<Ruby={2:2}ね>寝ちゃっ…<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:18 87 97 107 101 117 112 95 48 49]>...Kanny? You're back? I was waiting
and waiting and just shut my eyes for
a moment...<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:260]>...Oh, I'm sorry. You're definitely not
my boyfriend.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>我男朋友他……<unk[5:0]>去买鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>了，
还没有回来……
我也陪着他走到了半路，
但带着<Color=red>怪形岩石<Color=white>的鼓隆族过来纠缠，
我就怕得一个人先逃回来了……

<unk[3:0:3]>如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>，
还是多加小心比较好哦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>我男朋友……<unk[5:0]>
去鼓隆城買<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>到現在都還沒回來……
其實我原本也在途中和他同行，
但是卻遇到一群拿著<Color=red>奇形怪石<Color=white>的鼓隆族上前找碴。
我因為太過害怕，所以就獨自回來了……

<unk[3:0:3]>如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的話，
還是小心一點比較好喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼…<unk[5:0]> ゴロンシティまで<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}たいか>耐火のお<Ruby={4:8}ようふく>洋服<Color=white>を
<Ruby={2:2}か>買いに<Ruby={2:2}い>行ってるんだけど <Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ってこなくて…
<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私も<Ruby={4:8}とちゅう>途中までは ついて<Ruby={2:2}い>行ってたんだけど<Color=red>
<Ruby={2:4}へん>変な<Ruby={2:6}かたち>形の<Ruby={2:4}いわ>岩<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}も>持ったゴロン<Ruby={2:4}たち>達に <Ruby={2:4}から>絡まれちゃって
<Ruby={2:4}こわ>怖くて <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私だけ<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ってきちゃったのよね…

<unk[3:0:3]>あなたも <Color=red>ゴロンシティ<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}い>行くなら
<Ruby={2:2}き>気を<Ruby={2:2}つ>付けた<Ruby={2:4}ほう>方が いいわよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>My boyfriend went to buy some of the
<Color=red>fire-resistant clothes<Color=white> available in Goron
City, but he hasn't come back.
I went part of the way with him, but some
Gorons with <Color=red>strange-looking rocks<Color=white>
started bothering us.
I got scared and came back on my own.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:3]>If you're going to <Color=red>Goron City<Color=white>, then you
should be very careful.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>……艾纳西迈？你回来啦？<unk[5:0]>
我等你等得都睡着……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:266]>什么呀，原来是你……<unk[5:0]>
抱歉，把你错认成我男朋友了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:268]>……艾納西邁？你回來了？<unk[5:0]>
我等到累了就稍微睡……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:266]>……什麼嘛，原來是你啊……<unk[5:0]>
不好意思，我還以為是我男朋友。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:268]>…エナシマ<Ruby={2:4}くん>君？ <Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰ってきたの？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:2}ま>待ちくたびれて ちょっと<Ruby={2:2}ね>寝ちゃっ…<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:266]>…なんだ あなたか…<unk[5:0]>
ごめん <Ruby={4:6}かれし>彼氏と<Ruby={4:8}かんちが>勘違いしちゃった
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]>...Kanny? You're back? I was waiting
and waiting and just shut my eyes for
a moment...<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:266]>...Oh, you again. I thought you were
my boyfriend.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>我男朋友他……<unk[5:0]>去买鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>了，
还没有回来呢。
要不是带着<Color=red>怪形岩石<Color=white>的鼓隆族

如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>，

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>我男朋友……<unk[5:0]>去鼓隆城買<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>，

如果你也要去<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的話，

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼…<unk[5:0]> ゴロンシティまで<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}たいか>耐火のお<Ruby={4:8}ようふく>洋服<Color=white>を

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>My boyfriend went to buy some of the
<Color=red>fire-resistant clothes <Color=white>available in Goron
City, but he hasn't come back yet.
If we hadn't gotten tangled up with those
Gorons with the <Color=red>strangely shaped rocks<Color=white>,
I would be with him right now...
If you're going to <Color=red>Goron City<Color=white>, then you
should be very careful.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊，抱歉……
视线总忍不住追逐时尚的人……<unk[5:1]>
我和我男朋友都沉迷时兴的打扮，

原本打算一起去买
鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>，
<unk[3:0:10]>可是在路上被凶恶的鼓隆族纠缠，
我实在太害怕，就一个人先回来了。
<unk[3:0:268]>不过<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的治安
已经恢复原样，
差不多也该回来了呀……

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>他究竟在干什么呢……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊，不好意思。
我一看到時尚服裝就會被吸引視線……<unk[5:1]>
我男朋友也和我一樣非常注重時尚喔。

我跟男朋友原本想一起去買
鼓隆城販售的<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>，
<unk[3:0:10]>但是途中卻遇到一群感覺很危險的鼓隆族上前找碴。
我因為太過害怕，所以就獨自回來了。
<unk[3:0:268]>不過我聽說<Color=red>鼓隆城<Color=white>的治安
已經恢復原狀，
他也差不多該回來了吧……

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>他到底在做什麼呢……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>あ ごめんなさい
すぐファッションに <Ruby={2:2}め>目がいってしまって…<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私の<Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼も ファッションに<Ruby={2:2}め>目がなくて

<Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼と<Ruby={4:6}ふたり>二人で ゴロンシティに<Ruby={2:2}う>売ってる<Color=red>
<Ruby={4:6}たいか>耐火のお<Ruby={4:8}ようふく>洋服<Color=white>を <Ruby={2:2}か>買いに<Ruby={2:2}い>行こうとしたんだけど
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={4:8}とちゅう>途中でガラの<Ruby={2:4}わる>悪そうなゴロン<Ruby={2:4}たち>達に<Ruby={2:4}から>絡まれちゃって
<Ruby={2:4}こわ>怖くて <Ruby={2:6}わたし>私だけ<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ってきちゃったのよね
<unk[3:0:268]>でも もう<Color=red>ゴロンシティ<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:6}ちあん>治安は
<Ruby={2:4}もと>元に<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ったってきいたし
<Ruby={2:4}かえ>帰ってきても いい<Ruby={2:4}ころ>頃なんだけど…

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]><Ruby={4:8}いったい>一体 <Ruby={2:4}なに>何してるのかしら…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Sorry. My eye for fashion can't help but
see what it sees.<unk[5:1]><PageBreak>I'm forever tempted by the latest styles.
The same is true for my boyfriend.<PageBreak>The two of us were going to go buy
the <Color=red>fire-resistant clothes<Color=white> sold in
Goron City, but...
<unk[3:0:10]>Just when we were about to arrive, we
got tangled up with some Gorons with
<Color=red>strange-looking rocks<Color=white>.
I got scared and came back on my own.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:268]>Luckily, I hear <Color=red>Goron City <Color=white>is completely
safe again.<PageBreak>There shouldn't be anything else keeping
him away, but he still hasn't come back.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>I wonder what in the world he's doing...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>哎呀，现在不是关心
别人时尚打扮的时候……
我男朋友去买鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>，
到现在还没有回来……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>我听说城里的治安已经恢复了，
他究竟在干什么呢……

幫別人進行時尚檢查的時候啊……
我男朋友去買鼓隆城販售的<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>，
結果到現在都還沒回來……
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>我聽說城市的治安已經變好了，

してる<Ruby={4:6}ばあい>場合じゃなかったわ…
<Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼 ゴロンシティに<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}たいか>耐火のお<Ruby={4:8}ようふく>洋服<Color=white>を

about fashion.<PageBreak>My boyfriend went to go buy the
<Color=red>fire-resistant clothes<Color=white> sold in Goron City,
but he still hasn't come back.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>I hear the city is completely safe again,
so I wonder what in the world is taking
him so long...

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>我很期待我男朋友买来
鼓隆城售卖的<Color=red>耐火服装<Color=white>，
可是完全不见他回来……

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>城里的治安应该已经恢复了，
他究竟在干什么呢……

鼓隆城販售的<Color=red>耐火服裝<Color=white>，

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>城市的治安應該已經變好了，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I'm looking forward to having a set of the
<Color=red>fire-resistant clothes <Color=white>from Goron City...

But I'm starting to worry that my
boyfriend won't be coming back.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>I've heard that the city is already safe
again, so what in the world is taking him
so long?

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={2:4}かれ>彼… <unk[5:0]>ゴロンシティに<Color=red> <Ruby={4:6}たいか>耐火のお<Ruby={4:8}ようふく>洋服<Color=white>を
<Ruby={2:2}か>買いに<Ruby={2:2}い>行ってるんだけど まだ<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻ってこないのよ
もうシティの<Ruby={4:6}ちあん>治安は <Ruby={2:2}よ>良くなってるはずなのに
<Ruby={4:8}いったい>一体 <Ruby={2:4}なに>何してるのかしら…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>My boyfriend went to buy some of the
<Color=red>fire-resistant clothes<Color=white> sold in Goron City,
but he hasn't come back.
I've heard that the city is already safe
again, so what in the world is taking him
so long?

rows.CNzh: 讨厌～这件衣服很珍贵的。
rows.TWzh: 討厭～這可是我寶貴的衣服。
rows.JPja: やだ～ これ<Ruby={4:6}だいじ>大事な<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服なのに
rows.USen: Nooo! Not my clothes!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>喂！能别在这种地方叫住我吗？
我珍贵的衣服都淋湿了呀！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>喂！你別在這種地方叫住我好嗎？
我寶貴的衣服都濕掉了耶！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>ちょっと！ こんな<Ruby={2:4}とこ>所で<Ruby={2:2}よ>呼び<Ruby={2:2}と>止めないでくれる？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:6}わたし>私の<Ruby={4:6}だいじ>大事な<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服が <Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れちゃうじゃない！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>Excuse you! Don't you see the rain?
I'm not interested in talking where my
precious clothes will get wet!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>喂，能不能不要光着身子
在这么大雨里跟我搭话？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>喂，你別在這種雨勢中
用那副模樣和我講話好嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>ちょっと<unk[5:0]> そんな<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>恰好でこんな<Ruby={2:4}あめ>雨ん<Ruby={2:4}なか>中
<Ruby={2:4}はな>話しかけないでもらえる？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>Excuse you! Are you seriously that against
wearing damp clothes?

rows.CNzh: 在这里应该就不会淋湿了。
rows.TWzh: 在這裡應該就不會被淋濕呢。
rows.JPja: ここなら<Ruby={2:2}ぬ>濡れなさそうね
rows.USen: I hope I'll stay dry here...
